description: Style NoteAdd a pop meets punk edge this season to your summer staples from sepia. Style this piece with non-typical wardrobe updaters like a chunky bracelet or clunky heels to add an instant spunk to your ensemble. For a girly vibe, wear this with a pastel scarf or shrug and a whimsical hair accessory - effortless spring style! Product DetailsYellow sleeveless long top, has a shawl neck, twisted shoulder strap on the left and lace on the rightMaterial and CarePolyester blendRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
